hero.badge: N°1 ya Transit na Afrika ya Kati
hero.title: Moninga na yo ya logistique kati na
hero.description: Transit, dédouanement mpe import/export kati na RDC, Cameroun mpe Chine. Mbangu, bosembo mpe transparence.

services.sectionDesc: Résolutions ya logistique mobimba mpo na bosenga na yo ya import/export
services.customsDesc: Procédures ya douane ya mbangu mpe ya mobeko mpo na biloko na yo na RDC mpe Cameroun.
services.transitDesc: Transport multimodal ya sécurité kati na Chine, Cameroun mpe RDC.
services.importDesc: Gestion mobimba ya opérations na yo ya commerce international.
services.trackingDesc: Landá biloko na yo étape par étape na plateforme na biso ya numérique.
services.sourcingDesc: Koluka ba fournisseurs mpe kosalela négociation na Chine mpo na biloko na yo.
services.logisticsDesc: Solutions ya bout en bout: emballage, entreposage mpe livraison.

howItWorks.title: Ndenge esalamaka
howItWorks.subtitle: Procédure ya pete na étapes 4
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tondisa formulaire na biso na internet na détails ya envoi na yo.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Équipe na biso etalelaka demande na yo mpe etindelaka yo offre personnalisée.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Tokambaka expédition mpe olandaka na temps réel.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Kozwa biloko na yo na dédouanement inclus.

testimonials.title: Oyo ba clients na biso balobaka

cta.title: Opesi mpo na kotinda?
cta.description: Zwa devis na yo ya ofele na kati ya ngonga 24. Équipe na biso ya ba experts ezali na lisalisi na yo.
